info.description:
Cloud-native Manufacturing Execution System API for phygital fabrication.
Provides endpoints for order management, task/Kanban board operations,
machine control, telemetry, quality management, and real-time updates.
info.title: PravaraMES API

get.description: Returns usage summary for a specific tenant, admin access required

parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD), defaults to current month start
parameters.name: from

get.description: Returns aggregated usage metrics for the current tenant within a date range

parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD), defaults to current month start
parameters.name: from

get.description: Returns day-by-day usage metrics for the current tenant

parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD), defaults to current month start
parameters.name: from

get.description: Returns detailed health status including database connection and runtime metrics
Returns alive status for container health check
Returns ready status when database connection is healthy
Returns a paginated list of machines with optional filtering by status and type

post.description: Creates a new machine in offline status

get.description: Returns a single machine with all details

post.description: Dispatches a control command to a machine via MQTT

400.description: Invalid command or machine not configured

post.description: Updates the last heartbeat timestamp for a machine

get.description: Returns telemetry data for a specific machine with optional time range and metric filtering
Returns a paginated list of orders with optional filtering by status, priority, and date range

post.description: Creates a new order in received status

get.description: Returns a single order with all details
Returns all items for a specific order

post.description: Adds a new line item to an existing order

get.description: Returns paginated list of batch lots with optional filters

post.description: Creates a new batch lot for material traceability

get.description: Returns a single batch lot by its unique identifier

put.description: Modifies an existing batch lot record

delete.description: Removes a batch lot record from the system

get.description: Returns paginated list of quality certificates with optional filters

post.description: Creates a new quality certificate for tracking compliance and quality assurance

get.description: Returns a single quality certificate by its unique identifier

put.description: Modifies an existing quality certificate, tracks approval for billing

delete.description: Removes a quality certificate from the system

get.description: Returns paginated list of inspections with optional filters

post.description: Creates a new inspection record for quality assurance

get.description: Returns a single inspection by its unique identifier

delete.description: Removes an inspection record from the system

post.description: Marks an inspection as complete with pass/fail result

get.description: Returns a paginated list of tasks with optional filtering by status, machine, order, or user

post.description: Creates a new task in backlog status

get.description: Returns all tasks grouped by status columns for the Kanban board UI
Returns a single task with all details

put.description: Updates task fields including status transitions

post.description: Assigns task to a user and/or machine for processing
Changes task status and position, triggers automation for machine jobs

parameters.description: Move request with target status and position
parameters.name: body

get.description: Returns telemetry data with filtering by machine, metric type, and time range

parameters.description: Filter by metric type (temperature, pressure, etc.)
parameters.name: metric_type

parameters.description: Number of records to return (default 100, max 1000)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Returns aggregated telemetry data (min, max, avg) for a machine and metric

post.description: Inserts multiple telemetry records in a single request (max 1000)

get.description: Returns the most recent telemetry record for a machine and metric type

post.description: Called by Centrifugo to validate connection tokens
Called by Centrifugo to validate channel subscription requests

get.description: Returns a JWT token for connecting to the real-time WebSocket gateway

post.description: Receives invoice events from Dhanam billing service, validates HMAC-SHA256 signature, and stores the invoice with RLS tenant isolation
Processes order events from Cotiza Studio (created, updated, cancelled)

BearerAuth.description: JWT Bearer token from OIDC provider (format: "Bearer <token>")
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
